subject: RouteWeather password reset
body:
Hello Riley,

A password reset has been requested for your RouteWeather account.
Reason: Support-assisted password reset

Use this reset link:
http://127.0.0.1:5173/reset-password?token=ibHDK5wwsBlJflG1z0TU1X0EMxoJHFsrshJp3wdOL4c

This link expires in 120 minutes.
